implementation: Personal health monitoring information systems produce heterogeneous, asynchronous and privacy-sensitive data that are difficult to curate and reuse reproducibly.
Create a schema-first workflow for validation, harmonisation, quality control, privacy screening and reusable packaging.
N1-MHKit includes ingestion, schema validation, normalisation, quality-control, device-agreement, privacy and reproducibility modules.
Application to a real-world multimodal personal health monitoring dataset with 52 timestamped sessions.
File integrity, schema compliance, missingness profiling, device-pairing consistency, privacy scan and smoke tests.
Zenodo data/code package, documentation and reproducibility guide.
